author: y4rr
content: [result] Investigation shows this is already done. ferrotorch-core/src/ops/linalg.rs already uses faer::linalg::matmul (the same backend ferray-linalg wraps) for CPU matmul of large matrices (>128 dims). Small matrices use an optimized ikj triple-loop with unsafe get_unchecked. Rayon parallelism kicks in for m*k*n >= 512^3. Wrapping through ferray-linalg would add Vec->Array allocation overhead with no benefit since both systems call the same faer BLAS underneath. No changes needed.
